title: Cobblemon Fantasy - Rebirth
description: Cobblemon Fantasy is the superior cobblemon modpack providing tons of new content, not only with cobblemon extras, but also other mods including client-side mods to ensure you have the greatest experience!
body:
![Demonarchy Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9700af2f5ad3f6a4e6f7c3506a0a73ff53d91327.jpeg)

## **Guild Demonarchy's Fantasy Cobblemon is the ultimate plug & play experience featuring the last version of Cobblemon.**

### **Features:**
- **Fantasy World:** Custom new world generation that includes many structures and a beautiful fantasy world to explore with your cobblemon.
- **More Pokemon:** 15+ Datapacks adding models for unsupported Pokemon in the cobblemon mod. 
- **Legendaries:** Manual configuration to allow Legendaries to spawn in your survival world.
- **Trainers:** A level progression following NPC trainers that spawn in your survival world.
- **Flying:** Ride and Fly on many pokemon, manually edited to include new cobblemon added outside of the main mod.
- **Storage:** Includes backpacks and Tom's storage mod to ensure your items are always organized.
- **Building:** Many mods that add new blocks and items to decorate your builds.
- **Endgame:** Advanced  netherite, trims, and wings to propel you passed the vanilla endgame.

### **FAQ:**

1. Does Fantasy Cobblemon Support Mulitplayer?
  A: Yes.
2. What is the performance of Fantasy Cobblemon?
  A: It is required to play with at least 4gb of ram allocated to the modpack.


Support: [Discord](https://discord.gg/demonarchy)
